get.description: Get category detail by ID (admin only)
List orders with status filter (active includes pending/processing/shipped, history includes delivered/cancelled).

patch.description: Update customer name / email / phone on the order snapshot.
Update status / courier / tracking number with strict transition rules.
Update shipping address / city / postal code on the order snapshot.

post.description: Create a new product with one image via multipart/form-data (admin only)

parameters.description: Required only for simple product; default variant stock
parameters.name: stock

parameters.description: Product image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP)
parameters.name: image

get.description: Get product detail by ID (admin only)

put.description: Update product by ID. Send multipart/form-data; include a new image file to replace the stored image (admin only)

parameters.description: Product type flag: only false->true conversion is allowed
parameters.name: hasVariant

patch.description: Set product active flag through publish validation. Publishing requires valid variant invariants.

get.description: List product variants by product ID (admin only)

post.description: Create product variant by product ID (admin only)

put.description: Update product variant by product and variant ID (admin only)

delete.description: Delete product variant by product and variant ID (admin only)

post.description: Create a new order and order_items

parameters.description: fill customer details and receive midtrans token
parameters.name: request

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token

get.description: Provide order detail for user to track
Paginated active products. pageSize default 20 max 50. sort: newest, price_asc, price_desc. categorySlugs: OR filter, comma or repeated

parameters.description: Category slugs, comma-separated or repeat param
parameters.name: categorySlugs

get.description: Active product detail by public slug; includes variants

post.description: Update Order Status after finalize payment

parameters.description: fill customer details and receive midtrans token
parameters.name: request

paymentStatus.description:
ShippingAddress    string     `json:"shippingAddress" example:"Jl. Melati No. 20"`
ShippingCity       string     `json:"shippingCity" example:"Tangerang"`
ShippingPostalCode string     `json:"shippingPostalCode" example:"15810"`

totalPrice.description:
Courier            string     `json:"courier" example:"JNE"`
TrackingNumber     string     `json:"trackingNumber" example:"JNE-123456789"`
ShippedAt          *time.Time `json:"shippedAt,omitempty" example:"2021-01-01T00:00:00Z"`
DeliveredAt        *time.Time `json:"deliveredAt,omitempty" example:"2021-01-01T00:00:00Z"`

items.description: object is unsupported type in example value `[{{$ref: '#/definitions/dto.OrderItemDTO'}}]`
